title: Postdoc review (2020-2023)  ~  September 25, 2023

creators.name: Friedman, Daniel Ari
creators.affiliation: Active Inference Institute; COGSEC; University of California, Davis

description: This presentation reviews the 3-year NSF postdoctoral fellowship of Daniel Ari Friedman ( https://www.danielarifriedman.com/ ), from October 2020 to October 2023.  This presentation will be livestreamed at 3pm PT on September 25, 2023, at the YouTube link:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYwycyuaxoU

methods.name: Public communication of science
methods.description: Applied public communication of science methodology

key_findings: A comprehensive review of Daniel Friedman's 2020-2023 postdoctoral research structured around six working areas: (a) Biology, (b) Entomology, (c) Active Inference, (d) Cognitive Security, (e) Meta-Sci
